notes: Macro definition copied verbatim from Macros/Find_duplicates.sas. The 7-row stacked GWAS table is synthesized to fit the macro's contract: snp is the dedup key, two SNPs (rs16831827, rs7654321) appear in both hgi_b1 and hgi_b2, the rest only once. The macro selects rows whose snp has count(*) > 1, sorts by snp, and prints — the bundle should print exactly 4 rows.
